scripts.build: astro build && cp form-handler.php dist/ && cp -r vendor dist/ && cp -r email_templates dist/ && cp -r config dist/ && cp src/_worker.js dist/_worker.js
scripts.dev-with-php: astro build && cp form-handler.php dist/ && php composer.phar install --no-dev && cp -r vendor dist/ && cp -r email_templates dist/ && cp -r config dist/ && concurrently "astro dev" "cd dist && php -S localhost:8080"
